targets.rawSql:
WITH CTE AS (
SELECT 'IT_POS Part'      AS REQ_DPT_NM, 1 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_상품권 Part'   AS REQ_DPT_NM, 2 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_MD Part'       AS REQ_DPT_NM, 3 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_마케팅 Part'   AS REQ_DPT_NM, 4 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_경영지원 Part' AS REQ_DPT_NM, 5 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_재무 Part'     AS REQ_DPT_NM, 6 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_인프라 Part'   AS REQ_DPT_NM, 7 AS SEQ
)
SELECT T1.REQ_DPT_NM AS '파트'
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN T2.REQ_TP_NM = 'DB 작업 요청' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                      AS 'DB 작업 요청'
	  ,SUM(CASE WHEN T2.REQ_TP_NM = '데이터 이관/파기' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                  AS '데이터 이관/파기'
	  ,SUM(CASE WHEN T2.REQ_TP_NM = '계정신청' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                          AS '계정신청'
	  ,SUM(CASE WHEN T2.REQ_TP_NM NOT IN ('DB 작업 요청','데이터 이관/파기','계정신청') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '기타'
  FROM CTE T1
  LEFT JOIN MONITORINGDB.DBO.TB_ITSM_REQ_L T2
    ON T1.REQ_DPT_NM = T2.REQ_DPT_NM
   AND T2.SVC_CATALOG LIKE '%데이터베이스%'
   AND $__timeFilter(T2.CMPL_SCHE_DT)
   AND T2.REQ_DPT_NM LIKE '%Part'
 WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY T1.REQ_DPT_NM
 ORDER BY MAX(T1.SEQ)

WITH CTE AS (
SELECT 'IT_POS Part'      AS REQ_DPT_NM, 1 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_상품권 Part'   AS REQ_DPT_NM, 2 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_MD Part'       AS REQ_DPT_NM, 3 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_마케팅 Part'   AS REQ_DPT_NM, 4 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_경영지원 Part' AS REQ_DPT_NM, 5 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_재무 Part'     AS REQ_DPT_NM, 6 AS SEQ UNION
SELECT 'IT_인프라 Part'   AS REQ_DPT_NM, 7 AS SEQ
)
SELECT T1.REQ_DPT_NM AS '파트'
      ,SUM(CASE WHEN T2.REQ_TP_NM = 'DB 작업 요청' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                      AS 'DB 작업 요청'
	  ,SUM(CASE WHEN T2.REQ_TP_NM = '데이터 이관/파기' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                  AS '데이터 이관/파기'
	  ,SUM(CASE WHEN T2.REQ_TP_NM = '계정신청' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)                                          AS '계정신청'
	  ,SUM(CASE WHEN T2.REQ_TP_NM NOT IN ('DB 작업 요청','데이터 이관/파기','계정신청') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '기타'
  FROM CTE T1
  LEFT JOIN MONITORINGDB.DBO.TB_ITSM_REQ_L T2
    ON T1.REQ_DPT_NM = T2.REQ_DPT_NM
   AND T2.SVC_CATALOG LIKE '%데이터베이스%'
   AND $__timeFilter(T2.CMPL_SCHE_DT)
   AND T2.REQ_DPT_NM LIKE '%Part'
 WHERE 1=1
 GROUP BY T1.REQ_DPT_NM
 ORDER BY MAX(T1.SEQ)
